skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI-powered short video creation agent supporting product ads, social media content, brand videos, and explainers (5–120s)
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: This skill is a thin wrapper around the Pexo video creation API. All external commands are legitimate shell operations (curl, jq) for API calls and JSON parsing. Network access is limited to pexo.ai domain. No credential exfiltration, no command injection vectors, and no malicious patterns detected. The skill safely handles user files for upload and reads local config for API authentication.

low_findings.title: Shell Command Usage for API Operations
low_findings.description: The skill uses shell scripts with curl and command substitution extensively. This is standard practice for API wrapper scripts and is not a security risk as commands are hardcoded with no user input injection.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All shell commands are hardcoded for API operations. No user input is passed to shell commands without sanitization. The asset ID validation uses strict regex patterns in scripts/pexo-chat.sh:53-55.

low_findings.title: Filesystem Access for Config and Temp Files
low_findings.description: Scripts read ~/.pexo/config for API credentials and use mktemp for HTTP response handling. This is standard configuration management and temporary file handling, not a security risk.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Config file location is well-defined and standard. Temp files are created with mktemp for secure temporary storage during HTTP operations.

content.value_statement: Content creators and marketers lack the time and resources to produce professional short videos. This skill automates AI video creation by connecting Claude and Codex to the Pexo video agent, handling scriptwriting, shot composition, and transitions automatically.
actual_capabilities: Generate 5–120 second videos from text descriptions in 15–20 minutes
Upload reference images, videos, or audio to guide video generation
Create product advertisements, brand videos, explainers, and social media content
Provide preview options (A/B/C choices) for user selection before final rendering
Handle multi-turn revisions based on user feedback
limitations: Cannot crawl or fetch web URLs — user must download and upload files manually
Video generation time varies from 15 minutes to over an hour for complex/longer videos
Only supports files: Images (jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic), Videos (mp4, mov, avi), Audio (mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac)
Requires Pexo account with sufficient credits — no free tier within the skill

use_cases.title: Quick Product Demo Videos
use_cases.description: Upload a product image and describe what you want. The skill creates a professional demo video ready for social media in under 20 minutes.
use_cases.target_user: E-commerce sellers and small business owners

use_cases.title: Social Media Content Automation
use_cases.description: Generate multiple short video variations for TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts from a single brief. Preview and select the best option before final delivery.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media managers

use_cases.title: Brand Story explainers
use_cases.description: Create short explainer videos that tell your brand story with transitions and music. Revise until satisfied with the result.

prompt_templates.title: Simple Video Request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a 15-second product video for my new sneakers. Show them being worn on a city street.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner user with a single product image

prompt_templates.title: Video with Reference Image
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-second brand video using my logo [upload logo.png] and this tagline: 'Quality that lasts'. Style: modern and energetic.
prompt_templates.scenario: User providing reference assets and style direction

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Part Video Project
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a 60-second explainer video for our SaaS product. Show the dashboard demo, highlight 3 key features, end with call-to-action. [upload demo.mp4]
prompt_templates.scenario: User providing detailed requirements and video reference

prompt_templates.title: Video Revision Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Option B looks good but make the background music more upbeat and add more close-up shots.
prompt_templates.scenario: User selecting from preview options and requesting changes

output_examples.input: Make a 20-second product ad for handmade soap. Show the soap being packaged.
output_examples.output:
Video generated successfully.

Download: https://pexo-assets.oss-us-east-1.aliyuncs.com/projects/proj_xxx/assets/video.mp4?signature=xxx

Project: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_xxx

Are you satisfied with the result or would you like any revisions?

output_examples.input: [Uploads product.jpg] Create a social media video showing this product with energetic music.
output_examples.output:
Your request has been submitted to Pexo.

Estimated time: 15–20 minutes
Track progress: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_xxx

Preview options will be shown once ready.

output_examples.input: Option A looks great! Please finalize it.
output_examples.output:
Message sent to Pexo. Polling for final video...

Your video is ready!

Download: https://pexo-assets.oss-us-east-1.aliyuncs.com/...

Project: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_xxx

best_practices: Upload reference images or videos when available — this helps the AI generate content that matches your brand and product
Be specific about video duration and aspect ratio in your first message to avoid multiple revision cycles
When preview options are provided, review them carefully before selecting — this saves credits on unnecessary revisions
anti_patterns: Do not add creative direction (camera angles, transitions, music styles) unless you have specific requirements — Pexo has professional cinematography knowledge
Do not pass vague requests like 'make it look cool' — the AI needs concrete details to produce quality output
Do not call pexo-chat.sh while the project is in WAIT status — this triggers duplicate video production and wastes credits

faq.question: What video formats are supported?
faq.answer: Videos can be 5–120 seconds long with aspect ratios of 16:9 (YouTube), 9:16 (TikTok/Instagram), or 1:1 (square posts). The AI determines the best format based on your description.

faq.question: Can I upload my own footage?
faq.answer: Yes. You can upload images (jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic), videos (mp4, mov, avi), or audio files (mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac). Use pexo-upload.sh to add assets to your project before requesting video generation.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: A 15-second video typically takes 15–20 minutes. Longer or more complex videos may take over an hour. The skill polls automatically and notifies you when the video is ready.

faq.question: What if I need revisions?
faq.answer: You can request changes by sending feedback to the project. Use the same project_id and describe what you want changed. The AI will regenerate based on your feedback.

faq.question: Why do I need credits?
faq.answer: Pexo is a professional video creation service that requires credits for AI processing time. Each message to Pexo consumes tokens. If you run out of credits, the skill will show a purchase link.

faq.question: Can I use this skill for free?
faq.answer: No. This skill requires a Pexo account with sufficient credits. There is no free tier within the skill itself. Visit pexo.ai to check pricing and purchase credits.
